heading: Civil actions by Attorney General; notice of violations; certification respecting undertaking appropriate remedial action
label: 1710 Civil actions by Attorney General; notice of violations; certification respecting undertaking appropriate remedial action
notes: Effective DateSection effective on and after sixtieth day after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 21, 1974section 2(c) of Pub. L. 93–380section 1221–1 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: gives to the appropriate educational agency notice of the condition or conditions which, in his judgment, constitute a violation of part 2 of this subchapter; and

children.label: b
children.text: certifies to the appropriate district court of the United States that he is satisfied that such educational agency has not, within a reasonable time after such notice, undertaken appropriate remedial action.
